tasks.title: Generate A Release Notes Digest
tasks.description: Read newline-delimited deployment notes from stdin in the format '<team>|<change type>|<summary>'. Produce a markdown table summarizing how many changes each team shipped, sorted alphabetically by team.

test_cases.input:
api|feature|Added audit logging
web|fix|Fixed checkout redirect
api|fix|Patched token refresh

search|feature|Added filters
api|fix|Patched token refresh
search|fix|Reduced latency

tasks.title: Summarize Checkout Errors From Logs
tasks.description: Read newline-delimited checkout error messages from stdin. Produce a markdown table listing each distinct message with its count, sorted by descending count and then alphabetically for ties.

test_cases.input:
Checkout failed
Network timeout
Checkout failed
test_cases.expected_output:
| message | count |
| --- | --- |
| Checkout failed | 2 |
| Network timeout | 1 |

test_cases.input:
Timeout
Timeout
Auth failed
Auth failed
Auth failed

tasks.title: Roll Up Monthly Revenue From CSV
tasks.description: Read CSV rows from stdin with header month,amount. Produce a compact CSV report with one row per month and the total revenue for that month, preserving the first-seen month order.

tasks.title: Roll Up Incident Ownership From Terminal Output
tasks.description: Read newline-delimited incident records from stdin in the format '<owner> <status>'. Produce a short markdown incident report that lists only open incidents by owner, sorted alphabetically by owner.

test_cases.input:
alex open
sam closed
alex open
mira open

alex open
mira open
alex closed
zoe open
mira open
zoe closed
test_cases.expected_output:
- alex: 1 open
- mira: 2 open
- zoe: 1 open

tasks.title: Summarize Support Escalations Into Markdown
tasks.description: Read newline-delimited support escalation records from stdin in the format '<priority>|<team>|<status>'. Produce a markdown report that counts open escalations by team, sorted alphabetically by team.
